exact_text: The Borrower shall ensure that the Loan-to-Value Ratio does not exceed 65.0% on any Test Date.

For each Test Date occurring on or after the Effective Date and on or before 31 December 2026, the reference to 65.0% in Clause 10.2 (Loan-to-Value Ratio) of the Facility Agreement shall be replaced by 70.0%.
Subject to Section 3, the Lender waives any Default arising solely from the Loan-to-Value Ratio exceeding 70.0%, but not exceeding 72.0%, on the Test Date falling on 30 June 2026.
This waiver applies only to that Test Date and does not amend the Loan-to-Value Ratio threshold in Clause 10.2 of the Facility Agreement as amended by Amendment Letter No. 1.
The Borrower shall not make a Distribution unless that Distribution is a Permitted Distribution.
**Permitted Distribution** means a Distribution made from Available Cash where:
(a) no Default is continuing or would result from the Distribution;
(b) the Loan-to-Value Ratio, calculated immediately after the Distribution using the most recent Valuation, does not exceed 60.0%; and
(c) the Borrower has delivered to the Lender a compliance statement showing the calculation at least five Business Days before the proposed Distribution.
the Borrower making no Distribution from the Effective Date to and including 30 September 2026;
The Borrower shall not make a Disposal unless that Disposal is a Permitted Disposal or the Lender has given prior written consent.
(a) made on arm's-length terms for fair market value;
(b) where the aggregate Net Disposal Proceeds of that Disposal and all related Disposals do not exceed EUR 1,000,000 in the relevant financial year; and
(c) which is not made while a Default is continuing,
or any other Disposal to which the Lender has given prior written consent.
The Borrower shall apply all Net Disposal Proceeds arising from a Disposal, other than a Permitted Disposal, in mandatory prepayment of the Loan within five Business Days after receipt.
